STDM_0909501_0020.Text: You've heard from Gojo about the person leaking intel, right?

STDM_0909501_0060.Text: There's probably two or more people in contact with the curse users.

STDM_0909501_0070.Text: One would be a higher-up, well above the principal. I won't be able to do anything about that one.

STDM_0909501_0080.Text: The other, would be someone passing the information to that higher-up.

STDM_0909501_0090.Text: That's the one we're going to target.

STDM_0909501_0120.Text: Today is the last day for you to turn in your notebook.

STDM_0909501_0140.Text: I'm going to sleep for a bit.

STDM_0909501_0160.Text: I wonder where the real Mechamaru actually is.

STDM_0909501_0170.Text: Mechamaru's actual body, Kokichi Muta, is in the basement.

STDM_0909501_0230.Text: Now, we're certain that the mole is Mechamaru.

STDM_0909501_0240.Text: You're late. I've been waiting. I thought you forgot about me.

STDM_0909501_0250.Text: How could we forget about you?

STDM_0909501_0260.Text: You're personally familiar with the terrifying nature of the pact.

STDM_0909501_0270.Text: He's our enemy so why don't we just kill him already?

STDM_0909501_0280.Text: No, we can't kill him yet, Mahito.

STDM_0909501_0290.Text: He agreed to cooperate with us and provide information.

STDM_0909501_0300.Text: In exchange, we agreed to use your Idle Transfiguration to fix his body.

STDM_0909501_0310.Text: It's the pact that we all forged.

STDM_0909501_0320.Text: Killing him comes right after fixing him.

STDM_0909501_0330.Text: I wanted him to do some work for us in Shibuya, too. Such a shame.

STDM_0909501_0340.Text: You're the ones who broke our pact first, when you said, "We won't lay a hand on the people from the Kyoto school."

STDM_0909501_0350.Text: Hanami's the one who did that.

STDM_0909501_0360.Text: I won't argue with cursed spirits.

STDM_0909501_0380.Text: You're actually lower than a scumbag, so be grateful.

STDM_0909501_0410.Text: You're no fun at all. You should celebrate a bit more.

STDM_0909501_0420.Text: I'll do that after I'm finished with my promise.

STDM_0909501_0440.Text: All right, shall we get started?

STDM_0909501_0480.Text: Now, that's more like it, puppet master!

STDM_0909501_0490.Text:
Ultimate Mechamaru, Mode: Absolute
"Armored Puppet Ultimate Mechamaru Prototype 0"

STDM_0909501_0550.Text: I guess you won't break off your attack.

STDM_0909501_0560.Text: And you're not paying my attacks any heed now either.

STDM_0909501_0570.Text: That's when I shoot you with this!

STDM_0909501_0630.Text: I'll be able to see everyone!

STDM_0909501_0710.Text: I still have one simple domain and nine years of cursed energy left.

STDM_0909501_0780.Text: Is it okay if I pay you a visit sometime soon?

STDM_0909501_0781.Text: Since the exchange event, and since the baseball game, too.

STDM_0909501_0782.Text: I feel like we've all become closer friends to each other.

STDM_0909501_0783.Text: Maybe it's because we all work as jujutsu sorcerers.

STDM_0909501_0784.Text: But I feel like there was always distance between us, even when we all got along.

STDM_0909501_0785.Text: I suppose that's because being close would make it even more painful when we died.

STDM_0909501_0790.Text: I want to get closer to you, Mechamaru.

STDM_0909601_0020.Text: A roughly 400-meter radius Veil was lowered, centered around Tokyu Department Store's Tokyo outlet.

STDM_0909601_0030.Text: From what Kiyotaka Ijichi, the Supervisor, reported, the "Veil" that descended down only locks in ordinary people and blocks off cell phone reception.

STDM_0909601_0040.Text: The people locked within the "Veil" are telling everyone to "Bring Satoru Gojo." Non-sorcerers shouldn't even know of his existence, so perhaps someone is forcing them to say it.

STDM_0909601_0050.Text: Furthermore, because of the advanced barrier techniques being used, it is highly possible the Curse Users and Cursed Spirits that attacked the Tokyo-Kyoto Sister School Exchange Event are related to this.

STDM_0909601_0060.Text:
Due to this, Headquarters placed Sorcerers on standby at each location outside of the "Veil" and left Satoru Gojo to solve this incident by himself.
Where the Sorcerers are located is listed below.

STDM_0909601_0070.Text: Tokyo Metro Shibuya Station Exit #13. Team Nanami: Kento Nanami (Grade 1 Jujutsu Sorcerer), Takuma Ino (Grade 2 Jujutsu Sorcerer) (Under evaluation for Promotion), and Megumi Fushiguro (Grade 2 Jujutsu Sorcerer) (Under evaluation for Promotion).

STDM_0909601_0080.Text: Shibuya Mark City, Restaurant Avenue Entrance (Outside the Veil). Team Zen'in: Naobito Zen'in (Special Grade 1 Jujutsu Sorcerer), Maki Zen'in (Grade 4 Jujutsu Sorcerer) (Under Evaluation for Promotion), and Nobara Kugisaki (Grade 3 Jujutsu Sorcerer) (Under Evaluation for Promotion).

STDM_0909601_0090.Text:
JL Shibuya Station South Entrance
Team Kusakabe
Atsuya Kusakabe (Grade 1 Jujutsu Sorcerer)
Panda (Grade 2 Jujutsu Sorcerer) (Promotion Evaluation Postponed)

STDM_0909601_0093.Text:
Same Time, Bunkamura Street
Dogenzaka 2-Chome East (Inside the Veil)

STDM_0909601_0120.Text: They're making Gojo do this all by himself?!

STDM_0909601_0130.Text: I understand the logic, but there has to be something we can do to help him out!

STDM_0909601_0150.Text: That's why we're heading to Shibuya now.

STDM_0909601_0170.Text:
Team Mei Mei
Mei Mei (Grade 1 Jujutsu Sorcerer)
Ui Ui
Yuji Itadori (Promotion Evaluation Postponed)

STDM_0909601_0190.Text: Itadori, we have a change in plans.

STDM_0909601_0200.Text: Another veil like the one in Shibuya was lowered over Meiji Shrine Station. We're heading to that one instead.

STDM_0909601_0210.Text: We're running there. So try to keep up.

STDM_0909701_0010.Text:
20:40
Tokyo Metro, Shibuya Station
B5F, Shin-toshin Line Platform

STDM_0909701_0020.Text: [laughs] I see you're all fully prepared.

STDM_0909701_0040.Text: You won't have any excuses left when you lose this time.

STDM_0909701_0050.Text: And have you given any thought to the first excuse you'll use when you get beaten by the three of us?

STDM_0909701_0060.Text: Afterwards, the Cursed Spirits used ordinary people as pawns to restrict Satoru Gojo's movements and opened the platform gates.

STDM_0909701_0070.Text: Once the ordinary humans overflowed the train platform and began falling onto the tracks, the Cursed Spirits rampaged and slaughtered their way towards Satoru Gojo.

STDM_0909701_0110.Text: That makes sense. For you guys. I suppose you would think that after allying with curse users.

STDM_0909701_0120.Text: Domain Amplification. It's the same principle as the New Shadow School's simple domain.

STDM_0909701_0130.Text: If they pulled it off right, it would allow their attacks to hit me.

STDM_0909701_0150.Text: Oh really? Here comes the excuses.

STDM_0909701_0170.Text: I'm saying I'm actually shocked you would've ever thought you could beat me with this loser shit.

STDM_0909703_0210.Text: This is where you're weak, right?

STDM_0909703_0240.Text: The more you try to neutralize my technique with your Domain Amplification, the stronger I'm forced to maintain my technique.

STDM_0909703_0250.Text: I don't think this asparagus has the energy left to withstand that, do you?

STDM_0909703_0270.Text: Satoru Gojo! Look what I have here!

STDM_0909703_0310.Text: Once Satoru Gojo exorcised Hanami, Jogo escaped into the crowd, and kept his distance while continuing his attacks.

STDM_0909703_0320.Text: The people who can't see cursed spirits have started avoiding me.

STDM_0909703_0330.Text: If their numbers keep declining and space opens up, then I can catch Volcano Head.

STDM_0909703_0340.Text: I’m sorry but I can't save everyone,

STDM_0909703_0350.Text: So, I promise... to exorcise them instead!

STDM_0909703_0390.Text: Man, the air smells so nice. Smells like sweet fear.

STDM_0909703_0400.Text: At Tokyo Metro Shibuya Station B5F, a train filled with Transfigured Humans arrived at the Shin-Toshin Line platform, and they began attacking the ordinary humans around them.

STDM_0909703_0410.Text: Many humans trapped on B4F began falling from the atrium onto the platform.

STDM_0909703_0420.Text: Mahito, who had arrived on the train, began killing humans with Jogo and Choso, who were already there. It was nothing short of a hellscape.

STDM_0909703_0430.Text: What I need you to do right now, Gojo, is to use your Infinite Void to kill us and all the people here, so you can save the people outside your domain.

STDM_0909703_0440.Text: But you're incapable of doing that.

STDM_0909703_0450.Text: You are only willing to accept one type of sacrifice. The type where people are killed by cursed spirits, not the type where people are killed by Satoru Gojo.

STDM_0909703_0460.Text: Now, think. Ponder it. Focus your mind!

STDM_0909703_0510.Text: It was a desperate gamble on a Domain Expansion lasting two tenths of a second.

STDM_0909703_0520.Text: Two tenths of a second was the limit Satoru Gojo set purely on instinct.

STDM_0909703_0530.Text: It was the amount of time he believed non-sorcerers could withstand being in Infinite Void without becoming vegetables or facing aftereffects.

STDM_0909703_0550.Text: After dismissing his domain, the strongest Sorcerer of the modern age…

STDM_0909703_0560.Text: Slaughtered all of the roughly 1000 Transfigured Humans unleashed upon B5F in 299 seconds.

STDM_0909801_0010.Text:
The Prison Realm is a living barrier.
It's what Genshin was reduced to.

STDM_0909801_0020.Text: There's nothing that cannot be sealed in the Prison Realm.

STDM_0909801_0030.Text: So, of course, there are conditions to sealing something in it, right?

STDM_0909801_0040.Text: Once the Prison Realm's gate is opened, we have to keep Satoru Gojo within its effective sealing range of four meters.

STDM_0909801_0050.Text: Make sure to keep him in there for at least one whole minute.

STDM_0909801_0080.Text:
You didn't join up with us just to push that impossible task.
You must have some kind of alternative agenda you're not telling us about, but I won't let you set us up to fail.

STDM_0909801_0100.Text: We don't stand a chance if it  means we have to fight that thing for a full minute.

STDM_0909801_0110.Text: It's all right. Even though we do need a minute.

STDM_0909801_0180.Text: It's only a minute in Satoru Gojo's mind.

STDM_0909801_0200.Text:
You shouldn't lose yourself in thought. 
Not in the midst of battle, Satoru.

STDM_0909801_0210.Text: I can't sense any cursed energy. I can't get my body to move, either. Is this checkmate?

STDM_0909801_0220.Text: So, who the hell are you?

STDM_0909801_0230.Text: I'm Suguru Geto. Don't you remember me? How sad.

STDM_0909801_0240.Text: All the information provided by my Six Eyes is telling me you're Suguru Geto.

STDM_0909801_0250.Text: But both my heart and my soul know otherwise!

STDM_0909801_0260.Text:
Now, answer me already!
Who the hell are you?!

STDM_0909801_0300.Text: I can pass from one body to another by replacing its brain with myself.

STDM_0909801_0310.Text: Of course, I can also use the techniques of the body I inhabit.

STDM_0909801_0320.Text: I really wanted this man's curse manipulation in this situation.

STDM_0909801_0330.Text: Tell the truth. You didn't have Shoko Ieiri dispose of Suguru Geto's body that day, did you?

STDM_0909801_0340.Text: An odd time for you to show consideration. Thanks to that, I was able to obtain this body with ease.

STDM_0909801_0350.Text: You needn't worry. I'll release your seal eventually. A 100—no, maybe a 1,000 years.

STDM_0909801_0360.Text: You're just too strong to let loose... and you're in the way of my current plans.

STDM_0909801_0370.Text: Have you forgotten something? Who do you think beat the crap out of that body before I eventually stepped in and killed it?

STDM_0909801_0380.Text: Yuta Okkotsu, huh? I just don't see as much appeal in that boy as you do.

STDM_0909801_0390.Text: Copying techniques without any conditions, and a bottomless well of cursed energy?

STDM_0909801_0400.Text: Both of those were just effects obtained from binding the should of his most beloved with a pact.

STDM_0909801_0410.Text: I'm sorry to say this, but Yuta Okkotsu could never replace you.

STDM_0909801_0420.Text: Good night, Satoru Gojo. Let us meet again in the new world.

STDM_0909801_0430.Text: Good night or not, it's time for you to wake up already.

STDM_0909801_0440.Text: How long are you gonna let it keep using you, Suguru?

STDM_0909801_0480.Text: Incredible! This is definitely a first!

STDM_0909801_0500.Text: You guys, are we going to do this or what?

STDM_0909801_0510.Text: I wanted to enjoy this sight for a little bit longer, but... you are right. I wouldn't want anything to happen.

STDM_0909801_0540.Text: Can you hear me, Yuji Itadori?

STDM_0909801_0550.Text: There's no time. I'm only going to say this once.

STDM_0909901_0010.Text: The small puppet that Kokichi Muta left behind before his death (known as Mini Mechamaru) activates. It relayed the message about Satoru Gojo's imprisonment to Yuji Itadori, Mei Mei, and Ui Ui.

STDM_0909901_0020.Text: Even though Mini Mechamaru could not provide enough evidence to prove himself trustworthy, he explicitly mentioned how four "Veils" with different conditions descended upon Shibuya.

STDM_0909901_0030.Text: With that in mind, he presented the following plan: Mei Mei and Ui Ui will drive back the Curse Users, while Yuji Itadori will make an exit to the outside while securing the train tracks.

STDM_0909901_0040.Text: Yuji Itadori returns to Meiji Jingumae and heads to Shibuya via the surface. He relays to everyone about Satoru Gojo's imprisonment.

STDM_0909901_0050.Text: With this, freeing Satoru Gojo became the top priority.

STDM_0909901_0060.Text: At 21:22, the three teams on standby outside of the "Veil", the Nanami Team, the Zen'in Team, and the Kusakabe team received word that Transfigured Humans began attacking non-sorcerers, and all three teams decided to breach the "Veil".

STDM_0909901_0070.Text: With information from another Mini Mechamaru, they gleaned that the Curse Users are unable to move the imprisoned Satoru Gojo from where he is trapped.

STDM_0909901_0080.Text: Mini Mechamaru's plan had Sorcerers head to each of Shibuya's neighboring train stations and have them breach in once the "Veil that blocks Sorcerers" is lifted.

STDM_0909901_0110.Text: Gojo is in trouble! He's been sealed!

STDM_0909901_0120.Text: The sorcerers are going to be coming here in full force.

STDM_0909901_0130.Text: I've decided I'll be staying behind. What about all of you?

STDM_0909901_0140.Text: I'll avenge my younger brothers... by killing Yuji Itadori and Nobara Kugisaki.

STDM_0909901_0150.Text: I don't care about Kugisaki, but we're turning Itadori into Sukuna.

STDM_0909901_0210.Text: Honestly, I think I want to kill Itadori, too.

STDM_0909901_0230.Text: From what I could tell, after seeing Satoru Gojo in person...

STDM_0909901_0240.Text: Now that he's sealed away for good, the sorcerers and cursed spirits are even.

STDM_0909901_0250.Text: If Sukuna is resurrected, we'll have a huge advantage, and victory is basically ours, right?

STDM_0909901_0260.Text: But then doesn't that mean we're perfectly capable of winning with the forces we have now?

STDM_0909901_0270.Text: So let's kill Itadori! I'm sure it'll be fine! Even if we lose Sukuna, we're still in a position to win the battle.

STDM_0909901_0330.Text: To be more precise, the thing that's living within Suguru Geto.

STDM_0909901_0340.Text: Shibuya station is in pandemonium right now.

STDM_0909901_0350.Text: It's full of those special-grades, the cursed spirits they bought with them, the curse users tied to Geto...

STDM_0909901_0360.Text: As well as transfigured humans and normal people.

STDM_0909901_0370.Text: In that case, it'd be faster to attack through the subway from the neighboring stations.

STDM_0909901_0380.Text: But in order to do that, we need to find a way to lift that veil first.

STDM_0909901_0400.Text: There are several things only a first-grade sorcerer can manage.

STDM_0909901_0410.Text: I'm just going to step outside and take care of this with Ijichi.

STDM_0909901_0420.Text: During that time, I want you three to do something about the veil keeping sorcerers out.

STDM_0909901_0440.Text: Kusakabe and special first-grade sorcerer Zen'in should be inside this veil as well.

STDM_0909901_0450.Text: If you're able to meet up with them, please relay the situation and request their immediate help.

STDM_0909901_0470.Text: Also... take care of these two.

STDM_0909901_0500.Text: The three of us will break that veil before Nanami gets back!

STDM_0910001_0020.Text: So, staying outside the veil instead of surrounding themselves with it increases the risk of being discovered and defeated, but in return the veil's strength increases.

STDM_0910001_0030.Text: According to that logic, the veil's source should be somewhere rather obvious to us, right?

STDM_0910001_0040.Text: Hmm, somewhere obvious, that stands out.

STDM_0910001_0050.Text: From the information that Yuji Itadori got from Harajuku, Curse Users are protecting the Entrusted Veil at Shibuya's major locations.

STDM_0910001_0060.Text: At 22:01, Yuji Itadori, Megumi Fushiguro, and Takuma Ino ambushed Curse Users who were on the rooftop of Cerulean Tower in Shibuya from above.

STDM_0910001_0070.Text: After the Curse User, Jiro Awasaka, was captured by wires, he was thrown off the 41st Floor,

STDM_0910001_0073.Text: but through some Cursed Technique, Yuji Itadori and Megumi Fushiguro discovered he was alive, and they engaged him.

STDM_0910001_0080.Text: Now get up, you old trickster!

STDM_0910001_0090.Text: Good grief. I mean, these youngsters today have no pity for the elderly.

STDM_0910001_0120.Text: Back on the roof, Takuma Ino fought against the remaining two Curse Users by himself.

STDM_0910001_0130.Text: One of the Curse Users used Seance, a technique where the physical information of "Toji Zen'in" was placed into the other Curse User.

STDM_0910001_0140.Text: That just leaves the veil that's trapping Gojo, and the veil that's trapping ordinary people.

STDM_0910001_0150.Text: I wanted to ask this geezer more questions, but he won't wake up—

STDM_0910001_0170.Text: Takuma Ino received grievous wounds from "Toji Zen'in" and was thrown off the roof. Yuji Itadori and Megumi Fushiguro, who were at the base of the tower, managed to save him.

STDM_0910001_0180.Text: The veil's lifted. What now, Granny?

STDM_0910001_0200.Text: So go down there and kill as many sorcerers as you find.

STDM_0910001_0220.Text: Who the hell do you think you think you're ordering around?

STDM_0910001_0240.Text: What's the meaning of this? I only channeled the body's information, not the soul's!

STDM_0910001_0270.Text: I'm not sure exactly why, but my body has always been special.

STDM_0910001_0310.Text:
He's not doing well...
but he's not dead.

STDM_0910001_0320.Text: I'll take Ino with me and head outside the veil.

STDM_0910001_0340.Text:
Okay. You take care of Ino,
I'll go on ahead to the station.

STDM_0910001_0350.Text:
I agree that's the best course,
but operating alone in Shibuya right now is not.

STDM_0910001_0360.Text: All right, good, but if you...

STDM_0910001_0370.Text:
I know, if I die, you'll kill me.
Am I right?

STDM_0910001_0390.Text: Just as long as you understand.

STDM_0910101_0020.Text: At 21:40, on Shoto Bunkamura Street (outside the "Veil"), Nobara Kugisaki and Akari Nitta encountered the Curse User Haruta Shigemo.

STDM_0910101_0030.Text: Nobara Kugisaki attempted to fend off Haruta Shigemo by herself, but when Akari Nitta tried to escape, Haruta caught her and severely injured her legs.

STDM_0910101_0040.Text: Nobara Kugisaki was also injured when she tried to save her.

STDM_0910101_0060.Text: Although, is the reason really that important?

STDM_0910101_0070.Text:
I mean, who cares, the whole thing's fun, right?!
As long as I keep having fun, what else really matters?

STDM_0910101_0090.Text: I get to kill people that aren't in black suits.

STDM_0910101_0100.Text: He must have come to Shibuya with Fushiguro.

STDM_0910101_0120.Text: Come on now, man, just look around you.

STDM_0910101_0130.Text: I mean can't you see I'm holding a woman hostage here?

STDM_0910101_0160.Text:
How many are there?
Allies in their locations?

STDM_0910101_0190.Text: I didn't cut him? Not a scratch.

STDM_0910102_0210.Text: No, but I would have died without my technique!

STDM_0910103_0250.Text: On my way here, I found several of our assistant supervisors dead.

STDM_0910103_0290.Text: He's on another level. This is what it means to be a Grade One Sorcerer!

STDM_0910103_0300.Text: I want you two to wait here for the rescue team.

STDM_0910103_0340.Text: Grade One is the minimum level required for the fights ahead.

STDM_0910103_0350.Text: You would only get in the way.

STDM_0910201_0060.Text: At 22:10, Yuji Itadori arrives in the vicinity of Shibuya Station. He meets what appears to be the incarnation of Death Painting Wombs, and is attacked.

STDM_0910201_0070.Text: There's something I have to ask you.

STDM_0910201_0080.Text: Did my brothers leave behind any last words for me?

STDM_0910201_0110.Text: I'm talking about my younger brothers that you two killed.

STDM_0910202_0240.Text: It's the same cursed technique as Kamo.

STDM_0910202_0280.Text: Blood Manipulation is treasured as one of the Kamo clan's hereditary techniques.

STDM_0910202_0290.Text: Since Choso won't bleed out, he has no openings.

STDM_0910202_0310.Text: Itadori beat both of my brothers. Those two wouldn't lose to some idiot.

STDM_0910202_0320.Text: Who was that second voice he was talking to.

STDM_0910202_0330.Text: There's something else going on here. I need to stay alert.

STDM_0910203_0340.Text: I understand what my role is.

STDM_0910203_0350.Text: Fushiguro. Kugisaki. Nanami. My other upperclassmen.

STDM_0910203_0360.Text: All of them will pass through here on their way to rescuing Gojo.

STDM_0910203_0370.Text: So even if I die, I'm taking this guy out.

STDM_0910203_0380.Text: I don't have to be the one to rescue Gojo.

STDM_0910203_0400.Text: I haven't used my left fist since this fight started.

STDM_0910203_0410.Text: He probably believes I can't use it anymore.

STDM_0910203_0420.Text: So this attack using my right fist as a distraction...

STDM_0910203_0440.Text: What is this... that I'm feeling?

STDM_0910203_0470.Text: He's not dead. I can tell he's still breathing.

STDM_0910203_0480.Text: You apologize to my brothers in the afterlife.

STDM_0910203_0500.Text: To think that you'd lose to such an inferior opponent.

STDM_0910301_0010.Text: Satoru Gojo's been sealed, huh? I feel like I've been bushwhacked.

STDM_0910301_0030.Text: Geto is involved somehow, even if he is a fake. I imagine the trick lies there.

STDM_0910301_0040.Text: At 22:20, at the Inokashira Line Shibuya Station Avenue Entrance, Kento Nanami, Maki Zen'in, and Naobito Zen'in encounter an unconfirmed Cursed Spirit.

STDM_0910301_0050.Text: Once Naobito Zen'in attacked the Cursed Spirit, it spit out many skeletons thought to be from the non-Sorcerers in Shibuya. It transformed in a rage shortly after.

STDM_0910301_0080.Text: How dare... How dare you kill Hanami? Kill Hanami!

STDM_0910301_0090.Text: Now I understand you, no wonder you're weak.

STDM_0910301_0100.Text: You were still only a Curse Womb before.

STDM_0910301_0120.Text: Let me ask you something. Do you have any idea how many frames there are in one single second of animation?

STDM_0910301_0130.Text: Don't call me "cursed spirit." I am Dagon.

STDM_0910301_0140.Text: There's a modern tendency to raise resolutions and frame rates making animation these days.

STDM_0910301_0160.Text: Upscaling to 4K, and interpolation into a frame rate of 60 frames per second. Where will it end?

STDM_0910301_0170.Text: We all have our own names!

STDM_0910301_0180.Text: Don't you agree that's so uncultured?

STDM_0910302_0200.Text: The surge of shikigami isn't slowing down at all.

STDM_0910302_0210.Text: Is it possible the technique embedded into this domain is…

STDM_0910302_0220.Text: Maybe you understand now that the sea is the source of all life.

STDM_0910302_0230.Text: The Death Swarm technique is an endless stream of Shikigami.

STDM_0910303_0260.Text: Megumi Fushiguro, put on the defensive when faced with the limitless shikigami flowing out, used Chimera Shadow Garden to enter the Cursed Spirit's Domain.

STDM_0910303_0263.Text: The Special Grade Cursed Tool "Playful Cloud", makes its way to Maki Zen'in.

STDM_0910303_0270.Text: Maki Zen'in and Naobito Zen'in begin their counterattack once the sure-hit effect of Dagon's Horizon of the Captivating Skandha was erased.

STDM_0910303_0280.Text: Nanami Kento moves to support Megumi Fushiguro expanding his Domain.

STDM_0910303_0300.Text: That octopus guy. He currently thinks that both our domains are pushing for control.

STDM_0910303_0310.Text: But my goal is different from that.

STDM_0910303_0320.Text: I'll open up a small hole. In the barrier of this domain!

STDM_0910303_0330.Text: I think I can still open a hole large enough for someone to pass through for a few seconds.

STDM_0910303_0340.Text: Once we're out of this domain, we can win.

STDM_0910303_0350.Text: The edge of his domain is beneath my feet. I can tell, since I touched it when I entered.

STDM_0910303_0360.Text: I'm ready to go at any time! If all three of you jump in at once!

STDM_0910303_0370.Text: I hope you don't have any plans for staying behind here.

STDM_0910303_0380.Text: I'm risking my life. But I don't intend to throw it away.

STDM_0910303_0410.Text: The one who had inherited the curse of the Zen'in clan from birth.

STDM_0910303_0420.Text: And the one who could not completely cast off that curse.

STDM_0910303_0440.Text: to the one who left it all behind, now manifested in raw flesh,

STDM_0910401_0010.Text: "Toji Zen'in", having suddenly appeared within the Domain, exorcised Dagon with his powerful attacks, causing the Domain to release.

STDM_0910401_0020.Text: However, "Toji Zen'in" sent Megumi Fushiguro flying towards the roof and both of them disappeared. Jogo appeared shortly after.

STDM_0910401_0030.Text: Without giving them time to resist, Jogo easily dealt with Naobito Zen'in, Kento Nanami, and Maki Zen'in.

STDM_0910401_0070.Text: Also, an unconscious Yuji Itadori was force-fed Sukuna's fingers.

STDM_0910401_0080.Text: The culprits look to be Mimiko and Nanako Hasaba, who took part in The Night Parade of a Hundred Demons incident last year.

STDM_0910401_0090.Text: Afterwards, Jogo also force-fed even more fingers to Yuji.

STDM_0910401_0100.Text: Due to this, Yuji Itadori, Sukuna's Vessel, was unable to adapt against it and gave up control of his body temporarily to Ryomen Sukuna.

STDM_0910401_0130.Text: His strength is of a different kind than even Satoru Gojo's! It's overwhelming evil!

STDM_0910401_0140.Text: I fear that any move we make now might result in sudden death!

STDM_0910401_0150.Text: Mimiko and Nanako Hasaba used the fingers as a chance for an exchange between them and Sukuna, but Sukuna killed them on the spot.

STDM_0910401_0160.Text: Next, the cursed spirit. Your turn to talk.

STDM_0910401_0190.Text:
Our objective was bringing you back, Sukuna.
We just wanted your complete revival.

STDM_0910401_0200.Text: Forge a pact with Yuji Itadori before he returns!

STDM_0910401_0210.Text: A pact to grant you perpetual authority over his body!

STDM_0910401_0230.Text: I have already devised plans of my own.

STDM_0910401_0240.Text: But you know, when I look at you.

STDM_0910401_0250.Text: I will give you a reward as a token of appreciation for the fingers.

STDM_0910401_0260.Text: If you manage to land even a single blow on me, I'll work under you for the time being.

STDM_0910401_0270.Text: And to begin, how about I slaughter every human in Shibuya?

STDM_0910401_0290.Text: You'll be true to your word?

STDM_0910402_0300.Text: Come now. You mustn't stop trying.

STDM_0910402_0310.Text: I'll play with you again and again until I tire of this.

STDM_0910402_0320.Text: Why did you decide not to use your domain?

STDM_0910402_0330.Text: I already know I can't win in a battle of domains with you.

STDM_0910402_0340.Text: Is that how it went with Satoru Gojo?

STDM_0910402_0360.Text: Although, I'll admit you have managed to pique my interest.

STDM_0910403_0420.Text: Let's have a contest of firepower.

STDM_0910403_0450.Text: We'll no longer be the same. Especially not after we are reborn.

STDM_0910403_0460.Text: Yet even so, I eagerly await the day that the three of us are together again.

STDM_0910403_0470.Text: Cursed spirits are the true humans, not them.

STDM_0910403_0490.Text: You wanted to become a human?

STDM_0910403_0500.Text: Oh yeah, I know. You don't want to actually be human. You want their position. Did I get that right?

STDM_0910403_0510.Text: Even though I understand it, it's so foolish.

STDM_0910403_0520.Text: You really should have just burnt everything down. Burnt everything down to a cinder, without giving it a thought.

STDM_0910403_0530.Text: Casting aside race, future, everything, until you finally reached Satoru Gojo.

STDM_0910403_0540.Text: That hunger to seize your ideals? That's what you were truly lacking.

STDM_0910403_0560.Text: Even so, you managed to entertain me a bit.

STDM_0910403_0580.Text: I fought humans, sorcerers, and cursed spirits a thousand years ago, and you were still one of the better ones I fought.

STDM_0910403_0600.Text: What am I feeling right now?

STDM_0910403_0620.Text: I wouldn't know the answer to that.

STDM_0910501_0010.Text: Megumi Fushiguro, having been thrown into this fight by "Toji Zen'in", is once again on the defensive due to Toji's overwhelming physical strength.

STDM_0910501_0020.Text: Because of this, he thought about how Shoko Ieiri is in Shibuya, and pushing himself to the limit while conserving his shikigami, he counterattacked while trying to make openings in his opponent's onslaught.

STDM_0910501_0050.Text: So about my kid. He's definitely got potential.

STDM_0910501_0060.Text: When he's 5 or 6 and his cursed technique manifests, I wouldn't mind giving him to you.

STDM_0910501_0070.Text: Depending on how much you'll pay, of course.

STDM_0910501_0080.Text: If he has an inherited technique, I'll take 8. And I'll take 7 if he doesn't.

STDM_0910501_0090.Text: Ha! If he has an inherited technique, I'll pay you 10.

STDM_0910501_0100.Text: Even if that place was a trash dump to me, it should be better for someone like him, someone with talent.

STDM_0910501_0110.Text: Not that I care anymore. Not that I care at all.

STDM_0910501_0160.Text: You mean your last name is not Zen'in?

STDM_0910501_0180.Text: What the hell. Why'd he do that?

STDM_0910501_0190.Text: I can't worry about that now. I need... I need to get to Ieiri fast.

STDM_0910601_0010.Text: Right after finishing his fight with "Toji Zen'in", Megumi Fushiguro was severely injured after Haruta Shigemo hit him with a surprise attack.

STDM_0910601_0020.Text: The resulting wounds and exhaustion from consecutive fights had taken a toll on him. He was no longer able to fight back effectively, and so he retreated to SHIBUYA109.

STDM_0910601_0050.Text: only two Demon Dogs are granted to the user at first.

STDM_0910601_0060.Text: The other shikigami aren't granted to the user until they finish subjugating them.

STDM_0910601_0070.Text: The user must continue subjugating each one to increase the shikigami available to them. Until they are finally able to command all ten shikigami.

STDM_0910601_0080.Text: Thing is, this subjugation can be done with multiple people.

STDM_0910601_0090.Text: Although, conducting the subjugation with multiple people will void it afterward. Which means, the ritual becomes pointless because the technique gets nullified.

STDM_0910601_0100.Text: Still, even though it's pointless, it has its uses for a sorcerer.

STDM_0910601_0110.Text: Now, while the Shikigami can't be used without first subjugating it,

STDM_0910601_0120.Text: the user can summon them as many times as necessary for the purpose of subjugating them.

STDM_0910601_0140.Text: In all of sorcerer history, there's never been anyone who's managed to subjugate this one.

STDM_0910601_0150.Text: Do you know why the Gojo clan and the Zen'in clan are on bad terms?

STDM_0910601_0160.Text: Sparks have been constantly flying ever since the Edo Era. Or was it the Keicho Era? I forget which one.

STDM_0910601_0170.Text: Who headed the clans back then?

STDM_0910601_0180.Text: The Gojo family had someone like me who had both the Six-Eyes and the Limitless technique.

STDM_0910601_0190.Text: The Zen'in clan had someone with the same technique as you, Megumi.

STDM_0910601_0210.Text: You understand what I'm getting at? Right?

STDM_0910601_0220.Text: That doesn't mean I can become a sorcerer who's stronger than you.

STDM_0910601_0260.Text: He started that subjugation ritual! And he's forcing me to participate in the damn thing with him!

STDM_0910601_0340.Text: I'll be dying first. Let me see your best shot.

STDM_0910601_0350.Text: Megumi Fushiguro, with his back against the wall, summons Mahoraga.

STDM_0910601_0360.Text: With his foe, Megumi Fushiguro forcefully began the Exorcism Ritual, and decided that he'd rather have both of them taken out instead of losing to Haruta Shigemo.

STDM_0910601_0370.Text: Megumi Fushiguro, already wounded badly, falls unconscious after taking a hit from the freshly summoned shikigami.

STDM_0910601_0380.Text: However, Ryomen Sukuna, having taken control of Yuji Itadori's body, suddenly made his appearance.

STDM_0910601_0410.Text: So saving this piece of trash really was the right move.

STDM_0910601_0430.Text: There are things I need you to do for me before that.

STDM_0910602_0440.Text: For Megumi Fushiguro to survive, I'll have to defeat this shikigami as an outsider.

STDM_0910602_0460.Text: Now then. Time to have a little taste.

STDM_0910602_0480.Text: You're similar to Yamata No Orochi.

STDM_0910602_0490.Text: The incantation of sacred treasures and that great wheel, both represent perfect cycles and harmony.

STDM_0910602_0500.Text: Which suggests that this shikigami's ability is to adapt to anything and everything.

STDM_0910602_0510.Text: It's the ultimate late-throw in rock-paper-scissors!

STDM_0910602_0520.Text: You might have had a chance to defeat me if I was still in the state I was in back then.

STDM_0910602_0530.Text: Now you've fascinated me, Megumi Fushiguro!

STDM_0910603_0570.Text: Unlike other domains, it does not cut out a separate space with a barrier.

STDM_0910603_0580.Text: Manifesting an Innate Domain without sealing it in a barrier is like trying to paint a picture in the air without a canvas.

STDM_0910603_0590.Text: This is the only way to destroy the Mahoraga. Kill it with a technique before Any and All Phenomena activates.

STDM_0910603_0600.Text: Mahoraga's regeneration will soon be complete.

STDM_0910603_0630.Text: You little brat, be sure to savor this feeling forever.

STDM_0910701_0030.Text: That sounds good. Malaysia, yeah. Kuantan is nice.

STDM_0910701_0040.Text: I'll build a home on a secluded beach.

STDM_0910701_0050.Text: Finally get around to the countless books I bought but never read.

STDM_0910701_0060.Text: I'll go through them page by page.

STDM_0910701_0070.Text: Like I'm taking back all the time I've lost.

STDM_0910701_0110.Text: Kento Nanami, having suffered severe wounds from Jogo, encountered a horde of Transfigured Humans in Shibuya's underground.

STDM_0910701_0120.Text: He massacres all of the Transfigured Humans in the area.

STDM_0910701_0140.Text: I've been here the whole time.

STDM_0910701_0160.Text: What was I even hoping to accomplish in the end?

STDM_0910701_0180.Text: And yet I came back because of some vague idea that it was a job worth doing.

STDM_0910701_0220.Text: I can't say that. It'll just become a curse upon him.

STDM_0910701_0280.Text: What the hell are you, Mahito?

STDM_0910701_0290.Text: You don't have to shout, I can hear you fine.

STDM_0910702_0340.Text: Quit getting angry at everything. It's just a curse spouting nonsense, right?

STDM_0910702_0350.Text: However. Until you're willing to accept that fact,

STDM_0910702_0360.Text: you'll never really be able to beat me.

STDM_0910702_0370.Text: Do you ever stop talking? You just go on and on.

STDM_0910703_0380.Text: Nanami would never make the mistake of losing his cool.

STDM_0910703_0390.Text: Prove it to him. I am a jujutsu sorcerer.

STDM_0910801_0020.Text: Don't go, Kugisaki! Remember what Nanami said?

STDM_0910801_0030.Text: But even so. I'm not just going to leave. Not when I know they're still fighting out there.

STDM_0910801_0040.Text: Seeing Mahito kill Kento Nanami, Yuji Itadori flies into a rage and attacks him.

STDM_0910801_0050.Text: Unfortunately, Mahito fought back with his stocked up Transfigured Humans and transfigured survivors in the underground, and so the battle lingered on.

STDM_0910801_0060.Text: This is the most effective tool to break down Itadori's resolve.

STDM_0910801_0070.Text: Plus. I have one more card up my sleeve.

STDM_0910801_0090.Text: Okay, time to return to the "Let's Kill Itadori" show!

STDM_0910801_0120.Text: Try to catch me if you can!

STDM_0910801_0140.Text:
I'll take the underground.
You wander around the surface for a while.

STDM_0910801_0150.Text: Just come back when I call for you.

STDM_0910801_0160.Text: I know, you don't have to tell me.

STDM_0910801_0180.Text: Are you the special-grade cursed spirit that's been messing with our idiot.

STDM_0910801_0190.Text: Oh, my, my! Am I really that famous?

STDM_0910801_0200.Text: Yeah. For running away like a little bitch.

STDM_0910801_0210.Text: I like you. You seem worthy of killing.

STDM_0910801_0220.Text: Remember! Recall the essence of cursed energy that you seized back then!

STDM_0910802_0240.Text: I bet this one will work nicely on you.

STDM_0910803_0260.Text: With Nobara Kugisaki's Resonance that she unleashed on Mahito, the damage that his main body receives from Yuji Itadori is transmitted to his soul,

STDM_0910803_0270.Text: and his clone receives the same damage.

STDM_0910803_0300.Text: Yuji Itadori... isn't my only natural enemy?

STDM_0910803_0330.Text: I couldn't save anyone. I wasted everyone's efforts.

STDM_0910803_0340.Text: But... Thank you for showing me... that I'm not alone!

STDM_0910901_0010.Text: They learn that it was Mahito's clone which received Resonance, and the clone attempted to escape. Nobara Kugisaki followed close behind.

STDM_0910901_0020.Text: Shortly after, Mahito's clone arrived at where Yuji and his real body were fighting. The clone attempted to rejoin with the main body to heal themselves.

STDM_0910901_0040.Text: Was that double somewhere else before?

STDM_0910901_0050.Text: Is he planning to fuse back together and heal himself!

STDM_0910901_0110.Text: I thought everyone in my village was crazy. And I was completely convinced. I was the only sane one.

STDM_0910901_0120.Text: I used to say, "Everyone in that village is crazy." Of course that was never true.

STDM_0910901_0130.Text: It's that the crazy ones tend to have the loudest voices, so it seems like they're everywhere. And they feel free to step on other people's lives.

STDM_0910901_0140.Text: Though I guess I've changed my mind about that now.

STDM_0910901_0210.Text: [panting as if ITADORI is about to cry]

STDM_0910901_0270.Text: I bet you'd thought you'd be doing some common pest control!

STDM_0910901_0280.Text: Or defeating ghosts like in an old fairytale.

STDM_0910901_0290.Text: That's what you thought you'd be doing when you came down here, wasn't it?

STDM_0910901_0300.Text: Damn little brat, you're so naive!

STDM_0910901_0320.Text: It's not some fight to correct a mistake!

STDM_0910901_0330.Text: It's a clash of what we believe is right!

STDM_0910901_0340.Text: You and your fragile ideas of justice!

STDM_0910901_0360.Text: The bells of the Gion monastery in India...

STDM_0910901_0370.Text: Echo with the warning that all things are impermanent.

STDM_0910901_0380.Text: The blossoms of the sala tree teach us through their hues,

STDM_0910901_0410.Text: Sorcerers like us are the exception!

STDM_0911001_0020.Text: I can't... I can't... fight anymore!

STDM_0911001_0030.Text: It wasn't just Kugisaki. Nanami died, too.

STDM_0911001_0050.Text: So, I have to save that many more people.

STDM_0911001_0060.Text:
But I couldn't stop him!
I'm nothing more than a murderer!

STDM_0911001_0070.Text: It's true! What I thought was my conviction was just an excuse I made for myself!

STDM_0911001_0090.Text: Itadori... you're a man amongst men. Don't limit yourself to such narrowmindedness.

STDM_0911001_0130.Text: And all of our allies. We are all Jujutsu sorcerers!

STDM_0911001_0140.Text: As long as we continue to live, our friends who've passed away will not truly have been defeated!

STDM_0911001_0150.Text: Attempting to find meaning in the deaths of the fallen can, at times, defile the memory of those we've lost!

STDM_0911001_0170.Text: What is it that you have been entrusted with?

STDM_0911001_0180.Text: There's no need to find your answer to that now.

STDM_0911001_0190.Text: However, until you're able to find it, you cannot stop moving forward.

STDM_0911001_0200.Text: That is the one punishment imposed on those of us who live as jujutsu sorcerers.

STDM_0911001_0210.Text: Arata Nitta retreats from the front lines after healing Nobara Kugisaki with his shikigami. Yuji Itadori, after being healed with the same shikigami, returns to the battle with Aoi Todo.

STDM_0911001_0220.Text: I'm sorry, Nanami. I was trying to take the easy way out.

STDM_0911001_0230.Text: I even used my sins as an excuse to run away.

STDM_0911001_0260.Text: I'll be sure to take on your share of suffering too, Nanami.

STDM_0911003_0310.Text: It doesn't matter how powerful your attack is, or if you throw out a Black Flash.

STDM_0911003_0330.Text: With that, all three of them are now…

STDM_0911003_0340.Text: ...drawing out a 120 percent of their combined latent potential.

STDM_0911101_0010.Text: Let's kick it up a notch, Itadori!

STDM_0911101_0020.Text: This will be the last time you and I will ever curse each other!

STDM_0911101_0030.Text: The battle between Yuji Itadori, Aoi Todo, and Mahito continues even up to the surface.

STDM_0911101_0040.Text: Mahito splits up Yuji Itadori and Aoi Todo, and attempts to finish off Aoi Todo by unleashing multiple Polymorphic Soul Isomers, but Aoi Todo repels them.

STDM_0911101_0050.Text: With Yuji Itadori and Aoi Todo reunited, Mahito, with his back to the wall, expands his Domain.

STDM_0911101_0090.Text: It's a desperate gamble! On a 0.2 second domain expansion!

STDM_0911101_0100.Text: Due to this, Aoi Todo severs his own left hand after being hit with Idle Transfiguration. He is able to avoid a fatal blow from Mahito's Black Flash by focusing his Cursed Energy into his stomach.

STDM_0911101_0110.Text:
However, my technique has recovered!
And he can't clap his hands anymore!

STDM_0911101_0120.Text: This time, I'll kill him for sure!

STDM_0911101_0170.Text:
It was just for a moment, but I touched him.
It's a miracle I got off with only this.

STDM_0911101_0180.Text:
Don't worry, Todo!
Leave the rest to me!

STDM_0911101_0210.Text: I can't believe I took another Black Flash dead on at that moment!

STDM_0911101_0220.Text: But now I've finally grasped it.

STDM_0911101_0230.Text: The true essence of my soul! Its true shape!

STDM_0911101_0250.Text: Instant Spirit Body of Distorted Killing.

STDM_0911102_0270.Text: I finally understood after using Black Flash, about the true essence of what my unbridled soul is.

STDM_0911102_0280.Text:
I'm really shocked.
You didn't strike me as the journey of self-discovery type.

STDM_0911102_0300.Text: But I'm just starting on the final touches.

STDM_0911102_0310.Text:
Then once I'm done killing you,
I will finally be truly born into this world.

STDM_0911103_0340.Text: I really wanted to reject you.

STDM_0911103_0350.Text: I wanted to pretend I didn't understand what you said.

STDM_0911103_0380.Text: And if you're ever reborn again as a new curse, I'll kill you then, too.

STDM_0911103_0390.Text: Change your name and appearance, I'll still kill you again and again.

STDM_0911103_0400.Text: I don't need meaning or a reason anymore.

STDM_0911103_0410.Text: Maybe there will be some meaning to be found from my actions several centuries after I'm dead.

STDM_0911103_0420.Text: And I'm sure that I'm just one giant cog in the wheel.

STDM_0911103_0430.Text: And I'll keep on killing curses until I rust away.

STDM_0911103_0440.Text: Because... that seems to be my role in this war.

STDM_0911103_0480.Text: Would you like me to save you, Mahito?

STDM_0911103_0490.Text:
23:36
Shibuya Police Station, Udagawa Police Box Ruins

STDM_0911103_0500.Text: As Yuji Itadori managed to bring Mahito to the brink of death, a certain man appeared.

STDM_0911103_0510.Text: The man, called "Geto" by Mahito, looks to be "someone inside Suguru Geto" (hereafter referred to as "Geto") based on Mini Mechamaru's information.

STDM_0911103_0520.Text: Yuji Itadori attempts to take out "Geto", but is unable to handle him. "Geto" then uses Cursed Spirit Manipulation to turn Mahito into an orb.

STDM_0911103_0530.Text: Shall we continue... Our discussion of the world to come?

STDM_0911201_0010.Text: Matters should be settled already. There's no point in going to Shibuya now.

STDM_0911201_0030.Text: Am I that useless? Tell me the truth.

STDM_0911201_0040.Text: The situation isn't even on that scale anymore.

STDM_0911201_0050.Text:
Why didn't you say anything to us?
Why didn't you ask us for help?
I thought that we're all your friends?

STDM_0911201_0070.Text: No. I'm the one who was weak.

STDM_0911201_0080.Text: There was someone who I loved.

STDM_0911201_0090.Text: And I didn't care what happened to the world. As long as I could be at her side and protect her.

STDM_0911201_0100.Text: Even if that girl didn't want me... to be the one to protect her.

STDM_0911201_0180.Text: Please try to find some happiness.

STDM_0911201_0190.Text: Whatever shape it takes. As long as you're happy, my dearest wish in life will have come true.

STDM_0911201_0220.Text: It's hard to realize that he held us in such low regard.

STDM_0911201_0230.Text: I'll murder whoever makes my cute junior cry.

STDM_0911201_0240.Text: The Supreme Art of Cursed Spirit Manipulation is Uzumaki.

STDM_0911201_0250.Text: It shows true value when a cursed spirit who's above semi-first grade, is used in Uzumaki.

STDM_0911201_0280.Text: Did you think I wouldn't notice your presence?

STDM_0911201_0300.Text: The target is right below Nishimiya!

STDM_0911202_0330.Text: I also agree that conventional weapons

STDM_0911202_0340.Text: should be proactively used when fighting a jujutsu sorcerer.

STDM_0911202_0360.Text: Everything I've experienced. And everything I will!

STDM_0911301_0010.Text: What's the matter, Nii? Not feeling well?

STDM_0911301_0030.Text:
23:23 Shibuya Station
B3F Denentoshi Line Platform

STDM_0911301_0100.Text: I was born having three parents.

STDM_0911301_0110.Text: My mother, the cursed spirit that impregnated my mother,

STDM_0911301_0120.Text: and the man who mixed his blood into the affair.

STDM_0911301_0130.Text: The one who toyed with my mother. The loathsome.

STDM_0911301_0180.Text: The Kamo clan disgrace! The worst sorcerer in all of history!

STDM_0911301_0190.Text: Noritoshi Kamo is merely one of the many names I've had.

STDM_0911301_0200.Text: You can call me what you like.

STDM_0911301_0230.Text: ...try to kill my little brother Yuji Itadori?

STDM_0911301_0250.Text: Don't keep me waiting even a second longer.

STDM_0911301_0260.Text: Move it! I'm Itadori's older brother!

STDM_0911301_0270.Text: It's a side effect of my technique.

STDM_0911301_0280.Text: For every living being, that is their last and greatest change.

STDM_0911301_0290.Text: It was in that moment, I strongly sensed the death of Yuji Itadori, right before my eyes.

STDM_0911301_0300.Text: Which means that Yuji must also be my blood-related younger brother.

STDM_0911301_0310.Text: If Noritoshi Kamo has been extending his life by transferring bodies, then it's not an impossible idea.

STDM_0911301_0330.Text: I must use my full strength to perform my duty as the older brother!

STDM_0911302_0340.Text: You fought hard. Bet you are exhausted.

STDM_0911302_0360.Text: Is that a reason not to risk my life for my younger brother standing right in front of me?

STDM_0911303_0370.Text: Taking advantage of the battle between Choso and "Geto", Yuji Itadori, Panda, and Noritoshi Kamo move to rescue Satoru Gojo.

STDM_0911303_0420.Text: I was the only one not frozen solid! Must have to do with Sukuna.

STDM_0911303_0470.Text: Could you please take this seriously?

STDM_0911303_0480.Text: Let me hear you say it out loud, Yuji.

STDM_0911303_0520.Text: Could I get your answer to my question from back then?

STDM_0911303_0530.Text: I was wondering what type of women you go for?

STDM_0911401_0020.Text: The ways to rid cursed spirits from our world?

STDM_0911401_0030.Text: The next stage for humanity will be freeing itself, breaking away from cursed energy.

STDM_0911401_0040.Text: You're wrong.  They'll optimize cursed energy.

STDM_0911401_0050.Text: I thought you already gave up on your plan,

STDM_0911401_0060.Text: 12 years ago, when Toji Zen'in died.

STDM_0911401_0070.Text: I went back to my original idea.

STDM_0911401_0080.Text: I don't desire a world without cursed spirits or any sort of idyllic peace.

STDM_0911401_0100.Text: Those are all possibilities of cursed energy.

STDM_0911401_0110.Text: Cursed energies in the form of human beings.

STDM_0911401_0120.Text: And yet, there must be more...

STDM_0911401_0140.Text: I was attempting to give rise to other possibilities from mankind.

STDM_0911401_0160.Text: Everything that I created myself was limited by the bounds of my own potential.

STDM_0911401_0170.Text: The answer was always there. It was glimmering darkly hidden within the chaos.

STDM_0911401_0180.Text: Do you understand? What I actually should have created was chaos that went far beyond my abilities to control.

STDM_0911401_0190.Text: And I've already finished extracting the technique.

STDM_0911401_0220.Text: I think that might be Tengen's barrier. No, wait.

STDM_0911401_0230.Text: Remote activation of a cursed technique?

STDM_0911401_0250.Text: I remotely activated Idle Transfiguration ahead of time on two types of non-sorcerers.

STDM_0911401_0260.Text: There were people whom I had absorb cursed objects, like Yuji Itadori did.

STDM_0911401_0270.Text: There were people who have Cursed Techniques, but whose brains were structured like non-Sorcerers, like Junpei Yoshino.

STDM_0911401_0280.Text: I've adjusted their brains to match those of sorcerers.

STDM_0911401_0300.Text: I have released the seal on those cursed objects.

STDM_0911401_0310.Text: When that happens, I'll have them fight each other in order to deepen their understanding of cursed energy.

STDM_0911401_0320.Text: I've carefully handpicked these people and cursed objects.

STDM_0911401_0330.Text: Think of it as unleashing a thousand malevolent Yuji Itadori's on the world.

STDM_0911401_0340.Text: Yes. This is the world of the future.

STDM_0911401_0370.Text: I have high expectations for you.

STDM_0911401_0410.Text: The world of Heian. The golden age of jujutsu!

STDM_0911401_0450.Text: You don't really intend to thank me. So let's just get to the point, shall we?

STDM_0911401_0460.Text: Now then, you understand that I'll obey your orders no matter what.

STDM_0911401_0470.Text: No amount of killing cursed spirits will prove anything to me about you.

STDM_0911401_0480.Text: Then forge a pact or whatever you need to do.

STDM_0911401_0490.Text: It doesn't matter that he's one of Gojo's students.

STDM_0911401_0500.Text: He cut off Inumaki's arm in Shibuya.

STDM_0911401_0510.Text: So for that I will kill Yuji Itadori myself.

STDM_0911401_0530.Text:
1) Suguru Geto's survival was confirmed.
We hereby declare the reinstatement of his death sentence.

STDM_0911401_0540.Text: 2) Satoru Gojo has been deemed an accomplice in the Shibuya Incident and his hereby expelled from jujutsu society. In addition, any attempt to free him from his seal will be deemed a crime.

STDM_0911401_0550.Text: 3) Masamichi Yaga is sentenced to death for inciting Satoru Gojo and Suguru Geto...

STDM_0911401_0570.Text: 4) The suspension on Yuji Itadori's death sentence is hereby revoked, and his execution shall be carried out promptly.

STDM_0911401_0580.Text: 5) Special-grade sorcerer Yuta Okkotsu shall be appointed as Yuji Itadori's executioner.
